evals.prompt: Design a landing page for a fintech SaaS startup
evals.expected: Design system: professional/dark style, Inter or Roboto font, blue accent palette (#3B82F6 or similar), glassmorphism or flat-dark treatment, CTA with strong contrast, trust signals in hero

evals.prompt: What UI style fits a luxury spa wellness brand?
evals.expected: Minimalism or soft glassmorphism style, serif heading font (Cormorant Garamond, Playfair Display), warm neutral palette (beige/cream/blush), large whitespace, smooth 300ms transitions

evals.prompt: Review this button component — it has no cursor change and no loading state
evals.input: button { background: blue; color: white; } — no cursor-pointer, no disabled state during async
evals.expected: Flag: missing cursor-pointer on clickable element, suggest disabled + opacity during async op, recommend transition-colors duration-200 for hover, minimum 44x44px touch target check

evals.prompt: Create a dark mode admin dashboard with glassmorphism style
evals.input: admin dashboard dark glassmorphism react tailwind
evals.expected: Dark base (#0F172A or #111827), glass cards with bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md, subtle border border-white/20, consistent z-index scale, accessible text contrast ≥4.5:1

evals.prompt: What accessibility rules must I check before delivering UI?
evals.expected: Minimum 4.5:1 color contrast, visible focus rings, alt text on images, aria-labels on icon buttons, tab order matches visual order, form labels with for attribute, prefers-reduced-motion respected
